import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import Header from './Header'; import 'bootstrap/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css'; import '@fortawesome/fontawesome-free/css/all.min.css'; const RFIDIntegration = () => { const [userInfo, setUserInfo] = useState({}); useEffect(() => { const userInfo = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('userInfo')) || {}; setUserInfo(userInfo); }, []); return (

RFID Integration in Third-Party Applications

Follow these steps to integrate RFID with your existing systems.

To Add Product or Inventory

Reusable Tag

  1. First, scan the RFID tag to get the EPC code.
  2. Use the "Add Product" API endpoint with the scanned EPC.
  3. Provide product details (ID, name, description, etc.) in the request.
  4. The system will register the tag for reuse with your inventory.

Single Time Use Tag

  1. Scan the new RFID tag to get its unique EPC.
  2. Use the "Add Single Use Product" API endpoint.
  3. Include all required product information along with the EPC.
  4. The tag will be marked for single-use in your inventory.

To Invoice the Products

Single Time Use Tag

  1. Scan all single-use tags that need to be invoiced.
  2. Use the "Create Invoice" API with all scanned EPCs.
  3. The system will automatically mark these items as sold.
  4. The tags will be deactivated after successful invoicing.

Reusable Tag

  1. Scan all reusable tags to be included in the invoice.
  2. Use the "Create Reusable Invoice" API endpoint with the scanned EPCs.
  3. Specify the quantity being invoiced for each reusable tag.
  4. The system will update inventory counts while keeping tags active.

For detailed API documentation, please refer to the Dashboard page.

Back to Dashboard
); }; export default RFIDIntegration;
